top_signals.title: UK forces board sanctioned Russian shadow fleet oil tanker
top_signals.summary: The U.K.'s Ministry of Defence says the SMYRTOS was in the English Channel and will be held off the south coast during investigations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump veers toward exit in Iran war but risks loom - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Trump veers toward exit in Iran war but risks loom  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold gains over 1% after US, Iran reach peace deal - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Gold gains over 1% after US, Iran reach peace deal  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US-Iran Peace Deal May Keep Rally in India Stocks, Rupee Going
top_signals.summary: The rupee has emerged as Asia’s best performer over the past month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops 10% in second-largest negative adjustment of 2026
top_signals.summary: The cut hands surviving miners roughly 11% more bitcoin per unit of active hashrate, but all-in production economics remain underwater at current prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Shipowners Seek Clarity on Hormuz Deal as 600 Vessels Eye Exit
top_signals.summary: A deal that could reopen the Strait of Hormuz within days has been met with caution among shipowners and traders, with many saying they would wait for more details in order to assess whether safe transits are possible after months of false starts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: FBI disrupts massive AI-powered phishing service using a million URLs
top_signals.summary: In a coordinated effort, the FBI, working with Google and Black Lotus Labs, has dismantled a massive Chinese phishing-as-a-service operation called Outsider Enterprise with thousands of phishing websites used to steal credit card data and passwords. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Vekic beats Raducanu in Queen’s Club final to end title drought
top_signals.summary: Raducanu was hoping to win her first title since her stunning U.S. Open victory as a teenage qualifier in 2021.
